meaning: v.举起,升起,促进,振奋,提高n.举起,情绪高涨,社会进步,道德提高
examples: The news gave them a much needed uplift.
This victory was a massive uplift for us.
Surround yourself with people who uplift, encourage and understand you.
Vince Gill, for one, wasn't going to let that stop him from his mission of uplift.
The principal, Peter Walker, wanted a building that would challenge and uplift his students.
